hero.subtitle: Run teams, buildings, quality and communication from one place — in real time, on any device.
hero.trust: 30-day free trial · No credit card · Cancel anytime
hero.audience_chip: Built for cleaning, facilities & property teams

portals.title: Our portals.
portals.subtitle: Every role gets its own portal, designed around what that person actually does every day — from the cleaner on site to the director with a 360° view.
portals.supervisor_who: Shift supervisors in corporate buildings, coworking spaces and workplaces
portals.supervisor_desc: Supervisors run their shift and building from their phone: log operative attendance, send daily reports to the manager, run quality inspections, and report incidents in real time.
portals.supervisor_f2: Daily report sent to the manager
portals.supervisor_f3: Zone-by-zone quality inspections with scoring and automatic feedback
portals.supervisor_f4: Direct chat with the team and management
portals.manager_desc: The manager has full visibility into every assigned building: who's working, what inspections scored, which timesheets and supply orders are pending approval.
portals.manager_f1: Real-time view of every building and supervisor
portals.manager_f2: Approve daily reports and supply orders
portals.manager_f3: Quality stats per building and per operative
portals.operative_desc: The operative sees their assignments, schedule and floors, and can receive messages from the supervisor or manager.
portals.operative_f1: Check shift, building and assigned floors
portals.director_tag: The 360° view of the whole company
portals.director_desc: The director gets access to every building, every manager and supervisor, global quality metrics, and can export full reports.
portals.director_f1: KPI dashboard: active buildings, operatives and supervisors online
portals.director_f2: Quality stats per building and per operative
portals.director_f3: Direct chat with managers and the team
portals.hq_desc: Absolute control of the platform: users, buildings, passwords, branding, security and access.
portals.airbnb_who: Airbnb hosts with multiple properties, holiday-let managers and property managers
portals.airbnb_desc: Organise and control cleaning of your Airbnb properties between guests. Each property has its own checklist, access log and automatic report to the host when the property is ready.
portals.airbnb_f2: Automatic per-property report — history, who cleaned and when
portals.airbnb_f4: Notify the host when the property is ready for the next guest
portals.airbnb_f6: Assign a cleaner per property and date
portals.airbnb_cities: Ideal for properties in London, Madrid, Barcelona, Lisbon and any city with an active short-let market.
portals.home_tag: Your home, always spotless. Your experience, always exceptional.
portals.home_who: Home-cleaning companies that want a premium experience for their clients
portals.home_desc: A complete platform that connects your cleaning team with every client elegantly and professionally. Two worlds in one: operational management for your business and a premium experience for the client.
portals.home_f3: Cleaner assignment per client and date

vip.eyebrow: For your client · the VIP experience
vip.title: Feel at home…
vip.subtitle: The client gets their own digital space — elegant, intuitive, with everything under their control.
vip.chat_desc: Talk to your cleaner or the team anytime. No calls, no emails — instant messages straight from the app.
vip.feedback_desc: After every visit, the client can rate the service with one click. Feedback goes straight to the team to continuously improve.
vip.reviews_desc: A wall of real testimonials from happy clients. Total transparency that builds trust before they even sign up.
vip.refer_desc: Share a personal link with friends and family. Every referral that becomes a client earns you a perk — discount, free visit or a surprise gift.
vip.history_desc: See every past visit, the report from each cleaning and who was in your home. Complete transparency.
vip.notifications_desc: Get notified when the cleaner is on the way, when they arrive and when they finish. Always informed — no surprises.

loyalty.title: Premium Club.
loyalty.subtitle: Turn your clients into brand ambassadors.

payments.title: Charge like a modern business.
payments.subtitle: Card, Apple Pay, Google Pay and BACS. Recurring or per visit. The client controls their subscription at all times.
payments.per_visit_desc: Pay only when you receive the service
payments.invoice_desc: Receive your invoice instantly after every visit
payments.methods_desc: Credit / debit card, Apple Pay, Google Pay, BACS
payments.history_desc: Check every invoice with one click
payments.control_desc: The client controls their subscription at all times
payments.security_note: Secure payments with SSL encryption and PCI DSS compliance

testimonials.title: Trust, transparency, peace of mind.
testimonials.q1: It's like having a digital butler. I know exactly when they're coming, how my home turned out, and I can tell them in seconds.
testimonials.q2: I referred the service to three friends and got a free cleaning. Incredible!
testimonials.q3: Seeing other clients' reviews before signing up gave me all the confidence I needed.

pricing.title: Start small. Grow without switching platforms.
pricing.subtitle: Two product lines: corporate for buildings and services, and home cleaning with a premium client experience.
pricing.trial_note: 30-day free trial — no credit card. Cancel whenever.
pricing.footnote: All prices in GBP, VAT not included. Volume discounts available. Change plans anytime.

comparison.title: Home cleaning — what's included in each plan.
comparison.subtitle: Every plan includes the elegant client portal. Premium features unlock as you grow.

security.title: Enterprise security, by default.
security.subtitle: Designed from the ground up for organisations that take data, compliance and uptime seriously.
security.rbac_sub: Granular roles, SAML, OAuth, MFA enforced
security.uptime_sub: Multi-region, encrypted at rest and in transit

faq.title: Frequently asked questions.
faq.q1: Do I need to install anything?
faq.a1: No. It's 100% web — works on any modern phone, computer or tablet. Operatives open the URL, sign in with a 6-digit PIN and they're in.
faq.q2: Can I import my existing data?
faq.a2: Yes. We have CSV importers for clients, buildings and employees. In most cases we upload the data for you during onboarding.
faq.a3: The operative can check in and upload photos even with no signal — everything syncs the moment they're back online.
faq.q4: Can I put my brand on the client portal?
faq.a4: Yes. Logo, colours and custom domain are included in Premium and Enterprise. On Professional you can upload your logo.

cta_banner.title: Start today. No card. No commitment.
cta_banner.subtitle: 30 days with your real team, no credit card. If it doesn't win you over, you don't pay — and if it does, you stay.

footer.tagline: We don't sell cleanings. We sell peace of mind, trust, and the feeling of coming home to a perfect place.
